changelog:
Add safe, balanced, and live Claude tool stream modes. Balanced mode streams text and thinking immediately while buffering tool arguments until valid complete JSON is available. Legacy bufferToolStreams configuration remains compatible.
新增 Claude 工具流安全、平衡、实时三档模式。平衡模式会立即转发正文和思考，同时等待工具参数形成合法完整 JSON 后再发送；旧版 bufferToolStreams 配置继续兼容。
